title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers demonstrates five techniques for reducing hallucinations and improving cost efficiency in AI agents: semantic tool selection filters context to reduce token usage; graph RAG replaces retrieval guessing with computed answers; multi-agent validation catches failures before user exposure; symbolic guardrails enforce rules outside prompts; runtime steering enables self-correction. Methods are illustrated with a travel agent built on Strands Agents, applicable to OpenAI, Bedrock, Anthropic, or Llama.
